text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide has made dramatic improvements
ever since summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has always been an imposing figure to Narita
Taishin, ever since they ran a race together as
children.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is still eager to win, undaunted by
Biwa Hayahide, which sends Narita Taishin into a
panic.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fear of being left behind pushes Narita
Taishin to act recklessly. In her impatience, she
ends up damaging her health.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin tearfully begs to run in the Kikuka
Sho because racing and winning are all that she
has.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm unable to deny her wish—not when her pleas
are so heartrending.
